page_size.note: Letter portrait (8.5x11 inches). Template is portrait, not landscape.

date_month.note: Between (month) label at x=206 and first / at x=239

date_day.note: Between first / at x=239 and second / at x=287

date_year.note: After second / at x=287, near (year) label at x=300

from_location.note: After From: label at x=88, top=144

to_location.note: After To: label at x=295, top=144

carrier_name.note: Above Name of Carrier label at top=587.5

main_office_address.note: Above Main Office Address label at top=609.4

home_terminal_address.note: Above Home Terminal Address label at top=631.4

total_miles_driving.note: Above Total Miles Driving Today label at top=596.2, x=82

total_mileage_today.note: Above Total Mileage Today label at top=596.2, x=179

vehicle_numbers.note: Above Truck/Tractor label at top=631.4, x=106

shipping_doc.note: After DVL or Manifest No. label at top=401.6

shipper_commodity.note: After Shipper & Commodity label at top=431

off_duty.note: Row center between gridlines at pdfplumber top=192.7 and 211.1 → center=201.9

sleeper_berth.note: Row center between gridlines at pdfplumber top=211.1 and 229.4 → center=220.3

driving.note: Row center between gridlines at pdfplumber top=229.4 and 247.8 → center=238.6

on_duty_not_driving.note: Row center between gridlines at pdfplumber top=247.8 and 266.2 → center=257.0

remarks.note: Remarks section starts at pdfplumber top=309, ends before Shipping at top=365

recap_70hr.note: 70 Hour/8 Day section (left side of recap table)

recap_60hr.note: 60 Hour/7 Day section (right side of recap table)
